name: Soymilk Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Use soy milk at room temperature.
2. Stir yogurt into soymilk.
3. Pour mixture into a clean jar.
4. Cover and allow to stand at room temperature for 14-24 hours.
5. Set aside a tablespoonful or two for starting future yogurts.
6. Use in place of dairy-based yogurt.
Shurtleff & Aoyagi, "The Book of Tofu"
